title: Day 60 Lesson 1 - Video Repetition 1
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these sentences:

Sentence 1 - ラッシュの　でんしゃで　まいにち　かようのは　たいへんですね。= Commuting every day on the rush hour train is hard, isn't it?

Sentence 2 - あさ　そとを　あるくのは　きもちが　いいです。= Walking outside in the morning makes you feel good.

How to use this lesson - When the repeat message shows and the video pauses, please repeat the sentence you have just heard. Keep practising until you can repeat perfectly!
